__DEL__1591789424440

39 posts
Use one with a rusty weapon in a forge and that's it.

And i bought all mine in rivervale.
▲ Page top
What?
QuoteReply
# Apr 28 2003 at 9:35 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592257532852
1 post
How do i use this?
▲ Page top
RE: What?
QuoteReply
# Mar 06 2004 at 7:11 AM Rating: Decent
jpstarcher
222 posts
place a stone and rusty weapon in forge and hit combine. on fail, you lose stone, but get rusty weapon back. succeed, and you get tarnished weapon.
▲ Page top
in RiverVale
QuoteReply
# Apr 12 2003 at 12:48 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788171373
1 post
Bodbin Gimple in Rivervale (near farm) has Stones, as well as ore, hammers, file mold,
chisel.

Sharpening stones in Freeport

# Nov 29 2002 at 9:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759325711
5 posts
At Groflah's Forge in North Freeport, loc is neg12.09, pos468.88. Kyrin Steelbone sells sharpening stones!
▲ Page top
Greta O'Reilly
QuoteReply
# Nov 28 2002 at 12:19 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592253331120
11 posts
Greta O'Reilly is the one who sells the sharpening stones in Halas. She is located behind McQuid's Dark Stout between the shop and the main town wall. I'm sending in the correction as soon as I post this message.

-Atenvelt Dragon
▲ Page top
Rose McDowell
QuoteReply
# Nov 25 2002 at 5:36 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759795156
249 posts
Don't bother searching the other merchants in Halas or Qeynos North and South...they don't have them either...i have spent 6 days searching and re-checking every merchant for the sharpening stones...so basucally all human and barbarian class pc's are out of luck...sounds like a bug report to me....wonder how many months it is going to take to fix it..no rush theres 400,000 players on-line

halas
QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2002 at 9:18 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759773566
2 posts
there is a merchant behind one fo the buildings that sells them in halas. it might be rose i dont know the name, but they are normally there. Not just because someone sold them to her.
▲ Page top
Rose in Halas
QuoteReply
# Sep 11 2002 at 8:05 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591779459682
View User Forum
31 posts
Sent a correction: You can also purcahse these from Rose in Halas for 3-4cp.
▲ Page top
RE: Rose in Halas
QuoteReply
# Sep 16 2002 at 10:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592252490012
485 posts
Thanks Talo... been all over Halas without luck looking for this thing. I'll be damned if I'm running to HK to buy one.

EDIT: Forget that! You CAN'T buy them off of Rose in Halas. If you did, it was only because someone sold them to her, and you bought them from her "player items" list. Her main list does NOT have sharpening stones. If you want them, and are in the Halas/SFG/Qeynos Area, be prepared to take a trip to Erudin or HK because VI failed to place them in ANY of these Towns. Luckily, I found a nice chap in Everfrost that had 7 stacks of the stones, and he gave them to me. I only used 10 to finish the newbie weapon quest for my alt (which ended up sucking horribly), just goes to show you that you can't trust everything you see here.

Edited, Wed Sep 18 02:15:08 2002
▲ Page top
RE: Rose in Halas
QuoteReply
# Oct 29 2002 at 5:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591772914912
50 posts
There is a vendor who sells them in Halas. She is outside around back of McQuaid's dark stout.

QuoteReply
# Oct 28 2002 at 7:41 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591757034178
44 posts
Thats because they use us as players as their source of info. If people don't send the info they don't have it to post. If you want them to have it run around and gather it for them.
